title: Citizen Deliberation on COVID-19 Restrictions and Recommendations 2021
description: The data consists of three different surveys to explore the views of Finns on the acceptability of the government's COVID-19 actions before and after the expert hearing and citizen deliberation. The aim of the survey was to find out how the expert hearing and deliberative citizen discussion affect citizens' perceptions of the acceptability of the government's COVID-19 actions. The citizen deliberation is part of the research project "Preparing for the next waves: towards cooperative and legitima
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
